personality_one_liner: A vibrant, approachable, and highly touchable matchmaking tool that feels like a friendly local handshake rather than a cold corporate job board.

spacing.rule: Generous tactile padding. Use md/lg between text elements, xl between major sections. Cards must not touch screen edges.

do's: Use on the sticky bottom tab bar to let swipe cards peek through.
Use on sticky primary CTA buttons floating over scrollable content.
Use on the action button bar (Pass / Like) floating inside the swipe card.
dont's: Do not use on regular input fields, list rows, or standard cards.

screens.name: Auth / Login
screens.purpose: Simple OTP or Google login with a warm, welcoming branded hero.
screens.layout: Top 40% is a warm abstract background (or illustration) with Shiftpe logo. Bottom 60% contains a large welcome heading, a phone number input field (surfaceTertiary background, pill radius), and a large pill-shaped sticky CTA at the bottom. Safe area bottom applies.

screens.name: Role Selection
screens.purpose: User selects whether they are a Student (seeking work) or Shop Owner (seeking help).
screens.layout: Two large, tactile square cards side-by-side or stacked vertically. Each card has an icon, a bold title, and a short description. Unselected state: surfaceSecondary with shadow 1. Selected state: brandTertiary background with brandPrimary borderStrong. Sticky primary CTA 'Continue' at bottom.

screens.name: Profile Creation
screens.purpose: Hinge-style step-by-step or vertical scroll profile builder.
screens.layout: Vertical scroll. Uses large, rounded input fields and textarea boxes. Implement 'pill' shaped chips for selecting skills/requirements. Include a prominent 'Add Photo' dashed-border box. The 'Save Profile' CTA must be sticky at the bottom inside a KeyboardAvoidingView with a glassmorphism backdrop.

screens.name: Swipe Deck (Home)
screens.purpose: Tinder-style card stack where users view profiles and swipe left/right.

states.empty: Illustration + 'You caught up! Check back later for more matches.' + Refresh CTA

screens.layout: Full-screen experience (minus safe areas). The main content is a large interactive card (shadow 2, radius lg). Card structure: Top 50% is a full-bleed photo with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse at 80% opacity) at the bottom edge. Text (Name, Role, Pay) sits over the dark scrim. Bottom 50% of the card is surfaceSecondary containing scrollable detail chips (Skills, Schedule, Bio). Floating over the bottom of the screen (outside the card) are two large circular FABs: Pass (surfaceSecondary with dark icon) and Like (brandPrimary with white icon).

screens.name: It's a Match
screens.purpose: Celebration screen when a mutual right-swipe occurs.
screens.layout: Full-screen modal. Background is the warm orange gradient image with an aggressive blur, or a solid brandPrimary background. Two large circular avatars overlap in the center. Large display text 'It's a Match!'. Two pill buttons below: 'Send a Message' (surfaceInverse) and 'Keep Swiping' (transparent with outline).

screens.name: Matches & Chat
screens.purpose: List of active connections and ongoing conversations.
screens.layout: Top section: Horizontal scroll view of 'New Matches' (circular avatars with names, unread dot). Divider. Bottom section: Vertical list of active chats. Each row is a minimum 56pt tall, containing avatar, name, last message preview, and timestamp. Touch targets must be generous.

warm_gradient_bg.alt: Abstract warm orange yellow gradient background

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT: No purple, violet, indigo, or blue anywhere in the app. Use the defined Terracotta/Marigold brand palette to feel warm, localized, and distinctly Indian.
STRICT: Ensure font weights never exceed 500. Use typography sizes to establish hierarchy.
SWIPE DECK: Implement swipeable cards using React Native Reanimated and Gesture Handler. Apply 'impactMedium' haptic on left swipe, 'impactHeavy' on right swipe.
CARDS: The swipe card must feature an edge-to-edge photo at the top half with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse) at the bottom of the image to guarantee text readability.
LAYOUT: Use sticky primary CTA buttons hovering over scrollable content. Give them a glassmorphism or solid surface background to separate them from scrolling elements.
Do not use generic avatars; use the provided Indian student and shop owner Unsplash URLs to make the UI mockups look realistic and tailored to the problem statement.
Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44pt, specifically for the Pass/Like FABs and all list rows.
